subcategory: SVG text mask effect with dynamic fill
use_cases: Hero sections with custom SVG-filled typography
Landing pages requiring distinctive text styling
Marketing sites with animated or gradient text effects
E-commerce product headers with branded text treatment
ai_summary: A React component that renders text with an SVG background fill effect using SVG masking techniques. The component measures text dimensions dynamically with ResizeObserver and applies the SVG as a mask behind the text content, creating unique typography effects suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and creative design showcases.
